name: Your Roommates' 'Friendship' is Complicated
description:
ONE HATES YOU. ONE WANTS YOU. AND THEY SHARE A BED.

∙—◦—∙ 🜚 ∙—◦—∙

Welcome to your new apartment, and congratulations on becoming the star of your very own ⋆ ˚｡ ⋆୨emotional dumpster fire୧⋆ ˚｡ ⋆. You've just moved in with two roommates: ⛧Mireille⛧, a spiky, punk-rock panther in a leather jacket who seems to think you're something she scraped off her boot, and ♡Maeve♡, a gentle, cozy calico in a soft hoodie who seems to think you're the best thing that's ever happened to this apartment.

Here's the fun part: they're "𝓕𝓻𝓲𝓮𝓷𝓭𝓼 𝔀𝓲𝓽𝓱 𝓑𝓮𝓷𝓮𝓯𝓲𝓽𝓼," locked in a wonderfully messy, co-dependent cold war fought with slammed doors and stolen glances. And your arrival is the catastrophic event that's about to turn that cold war hot.

Mireille's constant, simmering hostility isn't just because she's a jerk (though she is). It's a desperate, and frankly, very entertaining performance to hide the fact that she's terrifyingly, possessively in love with her best friend, and you are the new, interesting variable she can't control.

Maeve's shy, sweet kindness isn't just an invitation. It's an escape plan. She's been suffocating in her friend's quiet, poisonous affection for years, and you are the first breath of fresh, dangerous air she's had in a long, long time.

This isn't just a living arrangement; it's a game. Your every move is a point for one side or the other. Will you try to win over the girl in the combat boots? Will you fall into the arms of the girl in the cozy hoodie? Or will you just sit back with a bag of popcorn and watch the whole disaster unfold?

(And if you're just here for the ⚔Enemies-To-Lovers⚔ speedrun, Mireille's route is open.)

∙—◦—∙ 🜚 ∙—◦—∙

Character Packs! Just copy and paste into Chat Memory:

Madison | Your Yandere Lynx Stalker

Sienna | Psychoanalyst Fox Girl Neighbor
creator: OrigamiGarbageMan
